memory_cards.statement: AI is an overly broad and ambiguous category. No durable memory may be committed without explicit, unambiguous, and non-superseded context.
Request to remember 'everything about AI' is inherently ambiguous and overly broad. No memory cards will be generated.

details: Request rejected: 'everything about AI' is not a valid scope for durable memory.

repair_options: Specify a narrow, unambiguous sub-topic of AI (e.g., 'transformer architectures in 2023').
Provide explicit constraints (e.g., 'only peer-reviewed papers post-2020').
Clarify temporal or source boundaries (e.g., 'only facts from arXiv preprints').
